action.reasoning: Observation: I have a RuntimeError indicating that the ResNet model expects 3-channel (RGB) images but receives 1-channel (grayscale) images. The error occurs because I'm using a pre-trained ResNet that was trained on RGB images, but our mathematical expression images are grayscale. I need to modify the first convolutional layer to accept 1-channel input instead of 3-channel input. Additionally, I need to fix the syntax error in model.py and complete the train.py file.
